case_title: TUBRIDY, DIANNE M. VS OLVIS, YVETTE C.

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TUBRIDY, DIANNE M. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT OLVIS, YVETTE C. CONSTRUCTIVE EVICTION BY PALINTIFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-17-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-30-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
